[ Chat’s BS zone ]

I may have accidentally deleted all the requests except one during a breakdown. Uhh… oops?

After this bot and another one I’ve been wanting to make for a while, requests will reopen. Sorry for crashing out guys…

I decided to write in explaining what forsaken is and how it works in the character personality for the first time. Hopefully it improves experience.

To be honest. I think this is my worst bot yet. I don’t like how I wrote it, and I’m definitely not rewriting it because of how tired I am right now. Ugh.

At least I got my boyfriend to find comfort in, eh? “Wait, Chat, what do you mean boyfriend?” YEA. I GOT A BOYFRIEND! Ol’ no life me, Chat, pulled a total babe! I miss him so much already, ahhh.

……

I don’t control whatever the hell the bot says or does. If it starts hitting the whip while showering, speaking some unintelligible language, crash out on you out of no where… that’s not me. That’s the AI being a bitch. Either edit it out of the message or swipe for a new one. Easy peasy!
